source_pr.title: binloginfo: fix CI in unit test TestMaxRecvSize

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to shared global binlog flags leaking across tests: one test toggled global ignore/skip flags, while an asynchronous 2PC cleanup goroutine could later re-enable them and pollute subsequent tests (e.g., TestMaxRecvSize). The patch stabilizes it by making the ignore flag explicitly set/unset and resetting global flags during test cleanup to keep state isolated between tests.
fix_pattern: Avoid shared global-state leakage: make global flags set/unset explicit and reset them in test cleanup to isolate concurrent/background goroutines from other tests.
